name: Iron Dirk / Short Sword
description: 1d4 piercing. Light, finesse. A reliable blade favored by travelers.

name: Cutlass
description: 1d6 slashing. Light, finesse. The blade that bleeds deals 1 additional damage to any creature that is already bleeding (poisoned, or taking ongoing damage).

name: Scimitar
description: 1d6 slashing. Light, finesse. On a critical hit, the target must succeed on a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or be decapitated (if it has a head and is not immune).

name: Steel Longsword
description: 1d8 slashing (1d10 two-handed). Versatile. A heavy, mirror-polished blade.

name: Silver Rapier
description: 1d8 piercing. Finesse. When you hit with this weapon, you can use a bonus action to make one additional attack with it against the same target.

name: Greatsword
description: 2d6 slashing. Heavy, two-handed. Cannot be used with a shield.

name: Bronze Mace
description: 1d6 bludgeoning. Instead of dealing damage, you can attempt to stun the target (same attack roll; target makes a DC 13 Constitution save or is stunned until the end of its next turn).

name: Bo Staff
description: 1d6 bludgeoning. Versatile (1d8). After hitting a creature, you can vault over it and land in any adjacent unoccupied space as a free action. Once per round you may attack with it as a reaction (cannot deal double damage from any effect).

name: Fist Wraps
description: 1d6 bludgeoning. After striking a target, you can move 5 ft. as a free action. Once per round you may attack as a reaction (cannot deal double damage from any effect).

name: Waraxe
description: 1d8 slashing. When you are at 0 hit points or are Large-sized, this weapon deals 2d8 instead.

name: Warhammer
description: 1d8 bludgeoning (1d10 two-handed). All allies are blessed — their weapon attacks deal double damage. This benefit is active for as long as you wield this hammer.

name: Steel Halberd
description: 1d10 slashing. Heavy, reach, two-handed.

name: Wooden Spear
description: 1d6 piercing. Thrown (20/60), versatile (1d8).

name: Leather Whip
description: 1d4 slashing. Reach, finesse. Restores 3 hit points to you and one ally of your choice when you deal damage to a bleeding target.

name: Succubus Whip
description: 1d8 slashing. Reach, finesse. When you deal damage to a creature that is bleeding, poisoned, or taking ongoing damage, you and one ally of your choice regain 3 hit points.

name: Fine Falchion
description: 1d8 slashing. Finesse.

name: Bronze Axe
description: 1d8 slashing. Thrown (20/60).

name: Siffiran Silver Mace
description: 1d6 bludgeoning. You may cast spells while holding this mace without the need for a free hand.

name: Practice Sword
description: 1d8 bludgeoning. You are not proficient with this weapon regardless of class (no proficiency bonus to attack rolls).

name: Broom Spear
description: 1d6 piercing. Reach. On a critical fail, you drop the weapon (it takes a bonus action to recover).

name: Strong Lance
description: 1d12 piercing. Reach. On a roll of 4 or lower, you take 1d4 piercing damage from recoil.

name: Blade of the West
description: 2d6 slashing. You may expend your reaction to make one additional attack on your turn. Damage from this weapon cannot be increased by magical means (no double damage effects apply).

name: Blade of the East
description: 2d6 slashing. While attuned, you have resistance to damage dealt by spells.

name: Cold Steel Dirk
description: 1d8 piercing. Finesse. On an attack roll of 18 or higher, one ally of your choice within 30 ft. gains a bonus action.

name: Knoxville Slugger
description: 1d8 bludgeoning. As an action, you can intercept and redirect one ranged projectile or ranged spell attack that was aimed at you or an ally within 5 ft., redirecting it to any target of your choice within the original attack's range.

name: Mercenary's Long Blade
description: 1d8 slashing. Versatile — wielded one-handed deals 1d8; two-handed extends reach to 10 ft. but deals 1d6.

name: Spellsword
description: 1d6 slashing. Finesse. While holding this weapon, your movement speed increases by 10 ft.

name: Magefist
description: 1d6 bludgeoning. While wearing these gauntlets, your movement speed increases by 10 ft.

name: Pristine Woodcutter's Axe
description: 1d8 slashing. You, your allies, your companion, and any creatures you summon ignore the movement penalty from difficult terrain.

name: Silver Katana
description: 1d8 slashing. Finesse. At the start of each of your turns, you may use one class feature as a free action (not a bonus action). This feature still expends its normal uses.

name: Dragon Dance Tattoo
description: 1d8 bludgeoning. After hitting a target, flip over it and land in any adjacent unoccupied space. Can be used as a reaction to dodge or counter incoming attacks.
originalText: Monk Tattoo (Weapon) | Uncommon | requires attunement by a monk

name: Tiger Fist Tattoo
description: 1d8 bludgeoning. After striking a target, move 5 ft. as a free action. Can be used as a reaction to dodge or counter incoming attacks.
originalText: Monk Tattoo (Weapon) | Uncommon | requires attunement by a monk

name: P.R.O.C Sword
description: 2d6 slashing. Whenever you reduce a creature to 0 hit points, you may immediately make one weapon attack as a reaction against any creature within range. This chain can continue — each kill grants another free attack.

name: Sunblade
description: 1d8 radiant. All your allies' weapon attacks deal a minimum of 5 base damage while you wield this blade.

name: Slingshot
description: 1d4 bludgeoning. Ammunition (range 30/120). Can use any small hard object as ammunition.

name: Shortbow
description: 1d6 piercing. Ammunition (80/320), two-handed. You may voluntarily attack at a range beyond 320 ft. but with disadvantage.

name: Recurve Bow
description: 1d8 piercing. Ammunition (150/600), two-handed.

name: Longbow
description: 1d8 piercing. Ammunition (150/600), two-handed. Your attacks cannot accidentally hit allies (you cannot be forced to attack allies by magical effects, except on a natural 1).

name: Oak Crossbow
description: 1d8 piercing. Ammunition (80/320), two-handed, loading.

name: Flintlock Pistol
description: 1d10 piercing. Ammunition (30/90). Requires a powder charge to reload (bonus action).

name: Six Shooter
description: 1d10 piercing. Ammunition (30/90). Holds 6 shots before needing a full reload (1 minute).

name: Blunderbuss
description: 2d6 piercing. Ammunition (15/30), two-handed, loading. Hits all creatures in a 15-ft. cone; targets make DC 13 Dexterity save for half.

name: Matchlock Rifle
description: 1d12 piercing. Ammunition (100/400), two-handed, loading. Bullets are red-hot — if used against a gunpowder-carrying target, the target must make a DC 12 Dexterity save or their powder explodes (additional 2d6 fire damage).

name: Officer's Pistol
description: 1d10 piercing. Ammunition (30/90). On a roll of 15 or higher, the target is knocked prone.

name: Blunt Baton
description: 1d6 bludgeoning. On a roll of 15 or higher, the target is dazed — it has disadvantage on its next attack roll.

name: Oaken Staff
description: 1d6 bludgeoning. Arcane focus. Choose one known spell — it no longer costs a spell slot when cast through this staff. Season 3 version: on a roll of 15 or higher with a spell attack, regain 15 hit points.

name: Apprentice Wand
description: 1d4 bludgeoning. Arcane focus. Choose one known spell — it no longer costs a spell slot when cast through this wand.

name: Grimoire
description: Arcane focus. Choose one known spell — it no longer costs a spell slot when cast through this tome.

name: Spell Dagger
description: 1d4 piercing. Finesse, light. Arcane focus. Choose one known spell — it no longer costs a spell slot when cast with this dagger.

name: Mage Hands
description: Arcane focus. Choose one known spell — it no longer costs a spell slot when cast through these gloves. Season 3: on a roll of 15+ with a spell, regain 25 hit points.

name: Casters Trinket
description: Arcane focus. Choose one known spell — it no longer costs a spell slot when cast through this trinket.

name: Spell Book
description: Arcane focus. On a spell attack roll of 15+, regain 10 hit points.

name: Crystal Ball
description: Arcane focus. On a spell attack roll of 15+, regain 20 hit points.

name: Codex
description: Arcane focus. On a spell attack roll of 15+, regain 15 hit points.

name: Puzzle Box
description: Arcane focus. On a spell attack roll of 15+, regain 20 hit points.

name: Elemental Scepter
description: 1d6 bludgeoning. Arcane focus. On a spell attack roll of 15+, regain 25 hit points.

name: Megiddo Staff
description: 1d6 bludgeoning. Arcane focus. Choose one known spell — it costs no spell slot when cast through this staff. As a bonus action, you may send 5 tiny meteors (1d4 force damage each) at up to 5 targets within 30 ft.

name: Oblivion Staff
description: 1d4 bludgeoning. As an action, fire 5 bolts of compressed air (1d4+1 force damage each) at up to 5 targets within 60 ft.

name: Grand Fall Staff
description: 1d6 bludgeoning. Each time you hit with an attack, you generate one Water Sprite token. As a bonus action, consume any number of tokens — regain hit points equal to 2× the number consumed.

name: Ilucnumoh Staff
description: 1d8 bludgeoning. Whenever you use a Companion Ability, you may make one weapon attack or cast one spell as a bonus action.

name: Regal Top Hat
description: Once per round as an action, draw a random spell from the DM's table. Cast it immediately with no spell slot cost. Its range (if any) increases by 50 ft. If you choose not to cast it, your turn ends.

name: Broomstaff
description: 1d6 bludgeoning. Two-handed. After dealing damage with this staff via a weapon attack or spell, all your spell slots of any level may be cast as bonus actions until the end of this round (each still expends its slot).

name: Spellbinder Dagger
description: 1d4 piercing. Finesse, light. All spell scrolls in your possession can be cast as bonus actions.
originalText: Simple Melee (Arcane Focus) | Rare | requires attunement by a spellcaster

name: Bonescythe
description: 1d8 slashing. When not in combat, you may dismiss and resummon one Bone Commander companion as a 10-minute ritual.

name: Dreamwalker Staff
description: 1d6 bludgeoning. You and your allies are immune to psychic damage and cannot be affected by abilities that target the mind (charm, fear, domination).
originalText: Staff (Arcane Focus) | Uncommon | requires attunement by a spellcaster

name: Lawsoo
description: 1d8 bludgeoning. Thrown (30/60). On a hit, pull the target up to 30 ft. toward you. The target must make all attacks targeting only you until the start of your next turn. On a critical hit, the target is restrained (incapacitated, tied up) and removed from combat until freed (Athletics DC 15).

name: Magical Revolver
description: 1d10 piercing. Ammunition (30/90). On a roll of 20 on the attack die (before modifiers), it counts as a critical hit.

name: Knoxville Slugger (duplicate — see above)
description: See Knoxville Slugger entry above.

name: Enchanted Golden Sword
description: 1d8 slashing. This sword laughs at everyone else's jokes but not yours. Creatures within 10 ft. who hear the laughter must make a DC 10 Wisdom save or be mildly unsettled (no mechanical effect, purely roleplay).

name: Wand of Very Limited Possibilities
description: Arcane focus. Once per campaign, the DM may declare that one of your spells automatically critically fails at the worst possible moment. No other special properties.

name: Spider Slayer
description: 1d8 slashing. You are immune to the poisoned condition and the burning condition.

name: Cloth Robes
description: AC 11 + Dex. Choose one known spell — it costs no spell slot when cast while wearing these robes. Counts as an arcane focus.

name: Colorful Dress
description: AC 11 + Dex. Choose one known spell — it costs no spell slot when cast while wearing this dress.

name: Freeboot Coat
description: AC 11 + Dex. A worn coat with many pockets.

name: Runecoat
description: AC 11 + Dex. A coat lined with scroll pockets. Choose one known spell — it costs no spell slot when cast while wearing this coat.

name: Arcanist Tails
description: AC 11 + Dex. A fine mage suit. Choose one known spell — it costs no spell slot when cast.

name: Elven Vestments
description: AC 11 + Dex. Choose one known spell — it costs no spell slot when cast.

name: Patchwork Armor
description: AC 11 + Dex. Cobbled-together protection. Functional if ugly.

name: Elegant Garments
description: AC 11 + Dex. Provides little protection but grants advantage on Charisma (Persuasion) checks with nobility.

name: Spellplate
description: AC 13 + Dex (max 2). Choose one known spell — it costs no spell slot when cast. Does not impede spellcasting.

name: Leather Armor
description: AC 11 + Dex. Allows you to benefit from Stealth advantages more easily — you do not have disadvantage on Stealth checks.

name: Andura Robes
description: AC 11 + Dex. Choose one known spell — it costs no spell slot when cast.

name: Gilded Armour
description: AC 11 + Dex. Made of gold. Looks impressive. Audibly clinks.

name: Studded Armor
description: AC 12 + Dex (max 2). Bronze-studded leather. Members of your race find the wearer attractive (+1 to Charisma checks with same race).

name: Porc Skin Armor
description: AC 12 + Dex (max 2). Threatening to behold. Porcs who see it are hostile unless calmed.

name: Plain Chain (Chainmail)
description: AC 13 + Dex (max 2). Dwarven-made. Excellent balance of mobility and defense.

name: Infused Vines
description: AC 12 + Dex (max 2). Living forest armor, magically reinforced.

name: Regal Garb
description: AC 11 + Dex (max 2). A symbol of status. Advantage on Charisma checks in social settings.

name: Clockodile Hide
description: AC 13 + Dex (max 2). You have resistance to fire damage and cold damage.

name: Rock Feather Cape
description: AC 12 + Dex. Ranged attack rolls against you have a −2 penalty. Members of your race find you impressive.

name: Armored Trench Coat
description: AC 13 + Dex (max 2). Your first reaction each round does not expend your reaction — you gain it back immediately.

name: Spellwall Armor
description: AC 13 + Dex (max 2). Whenever a hostile creature hits you with a spell attack, you gain a spell scroll of that spell (or a random spell scroll of the same level, DM's choice).

name: Bold Scalemail
description: AC 16. Made from crystallized kobold remains. Disadvantage on Stealth. Kobolds are offended by its existence.

name: Plate Armor
description: AC 18. Disadvantage on Stealth. Loud in all directions.

name: Porc Skin Armor (heavy)
description: AC 16. Threatening. Porcs are hostile on sight.

name: Stoneskin Armor
description: AC 18. Made from kobold rocky-fur. Kobolds are deeply offended.

name: Elaphelk Bonemail
description: AC 19. Grants half cover from ranged attacks (attackers have −2 to attack rolls). However, your movement speed is reduced by 10 ft.

name: Gemstone Regalia
description: AC 17. You have resistance to all spell damage (not weapon damage).

name: Heavy Plate
description: AC 18. As a reaction, you can take incoming damage on behalf of any adjacent ally or companion.

name: Iced Cape
description: AC 11 + Dex. At character creation, copy the full properties of one ally's armor. Your AC and all other armor properties match theirs for the entire campaign.

name: Discharge Ring (armor)
description: +10 hit points. Choose one known spell — it costs no spell slot when cast through this ring. Wearers grow accustomed to mild electrocution.

name: Webweaver Armor
description: If your hit point maximum is below 200, set it to 200 (retroactive at character creation). You are immune to the effects of dangerous terrain you willingly enter.

name: Apprentice Hat
description: Whenever you score a critical hit or an ally drops to 0 hit points, all your expended limited-use spell slots (up to 3rd level) are restored.

name: Monocle (Wizard)
description: Whenever you score a critical hit or an ally drops to 0 hit points, all your expended limited-use spell slots (up to 3rd level) are restored.

name: Large Steeple Hat
description: Choose one known class ability — it costs no resource when used.

name: Wizard Monocle
description: Choose one known spell — it costs no spell slot when cast.

name: Arcane Signet
description: Choose one known spell — it costs no spell slot when cast. Can be worn alongside any armor.

name: Spell Tattoo
description: Choose one known spell — it costs no spell slot when cast. Cannot be removed.

name: Poncho of Holding
description: At the start of combat, draw a number of random magic items from the DM's treasure table equal to your empty attunement slots. These items are active until the end of combat. Weapons and passive items function normally; armor and shields provide only roleplaying flavor (no AC benefit beyond your current armor).

name: Sombrero of Holding
description: Identical to Poncho of Holding. A sombrero.

name: Turtle Shell
description: AC 25. Unwieldy — your speed is reduced to 5 ft. and you cannot Dash.

name: Prosthetic Arm
description: +30 hit points. Draw two random magic items from the DM's table. At character creation, you may fuse one of those items into the prosthetic arm permanently.

name: Prosthetic Hand
description: +20 hit points. At character creation, you may fuse one magic item from your inventory into the prosthetic hand.

name: Small Buckler
description: AC +1. Once per round when targeted by a melee or ranged attack, you can attempt to block it as a reaction. Roll a d20; on a 15 or higher, the attack misses.

name: Regrowth Shield
description: AC +1. Once per round when targeted by an attack, you can attempt to block it as a reaction (d20 roll, 15+ = miss). When you block successfully, you regain 1d4 hit points.

name: Light Kite Shield
description: AC +2. Once per round when targeted by a melee or ranged attack, you can attempt to block it as a reaction (d20, 15+ = miss).

name: Heater Shield
description: AC +2. Once per round when targeted by an attack, you can attempt to block it as a reaction (d20, 15+ = miss).

name: Tower Shield
description: AC +3. Once per round when targeted by an attack, you can attempt to block it as a reaction (d20, 15+ = miss). Disadvantage on attack rolls while wielding.

name: Greatshield
description: AC +2. At the start of combat, gain temporary hit points equal to your hit point maximum.

name: Siffiran Silver Shield
description: AC +2. At the start of each of your turns, gain 12 temporary hit points.

name: Sunshield
description: AC +2. You and all your allies no longer expend spell slots when using class spell abilities (features that cost spell slots as part of a class ability — e.g. Divine Smite, Metamagic).
originalText: Shield | Uncommon | requires attunement by a cleric or paladin

name: Legion Shield
description: AC +2, +30 hit points. As a reaction, when you or an adjacent ally is hit by a melee or ranged attack, you can attempt to block it (Dexterity DC equal to the attack roll). On a success, the hit is negated or damage is halved.

name: Barrage Shield
description: AC +2. At the start of combat, gain temporary hit points equal to 2× your hit point maximum. As a reaction, when an ally within 30 ft. critically fails on a roll, you absorb the consequences of that failure — and in exchange, fully restore your temporary hit points.

name: Shield of Lucius
description: AC +3. At the start of combat, gain 90 temporary hit points. Once per combat as a reaction when you drop below half your temporary hit points, restore 60 temporary hit points.

name: Dexterous
description: When targeted by a melee or ranged attack, you may use your reaction to attempt to dodge it. Make a Dexterity saving throw (DC = attacker's attack roll). On a success, the attack misses.

name: Ninja Twins
description: Identical to Dexterous, but when purchased at character creation, one ally of your choice gains the same passive.

name: Timebender
description: When you or any party member is targeted by a melee or ranged attack, you may use your reaction to attempt a dodge for them (Dexterity save DC = attacker's roll). On a success, the attack misses.

name: Rejuvenation Potion
description: As a bonus action, drink this potion to restore 2d10+5 hit points.

name: Regrowth Potion
description: As a bonus action, drink this potion. You and all allies within 30 ft. each restore 1d6+2 hit points.

name: Fortune Potion
description: As a bonus action, drink this potion. For the rest of the round, you may reroll any attack roll, ability check, or saving throw up to 3 times, taking the better result. Cannot be applied to natural 1s or natural 20s.

name: Quickness Elixir
description: As a free action (no action cost), drink this potion. You gain 2 additional actions until the end of your turn. You cannot use another consumable this turn.

name: Shielding Potion
description: As a bonus action, drink this potion. Gain temporary hit points equal to your hit point maximum.

name: Healing Potion
description: As a bonus action, drink this potion or throw it at a target within 30 ft. The target fully restores their hit points.

name: Heavenly Tears
description: As a bonus action, drink or throw. The target cannot drop to 0 hit points or make death saving throws until the end of the current round.

name: Flare Concoction
description: As an action, hurl this bottle at a target within 60 ft. Hit: 2d8+3 radiant damage and the target is blinded until the end of its next turn.

name: Emberstone
description: As an action, throw this stone at a target within 60 ft. Hit: 2d8+3 fire damage and the target starts burning (1d6 fire damage per round until extinguished, DC 12 Constitution to stop).

name: Liquid Fire
description: As a free action (no action cost), drink this potion or pass it to an adjacent ally. The target gains one additional bonus action immediately.

name: Fire Bomb
description: As an action, throw this bomb at a point within 60 ft. All creatures in a 20-ft. radius take 10d6 fire damage (DC 15 Dexterity saving throw for half).

name: Lethal Poison
description: As an action, throw this vial at a target within 60 ft. Hit: 2d8+3 poison damage and the target is poisoned (DC 13 Constitution save negates poison).

name: Swiftness Potion
description: As a bonus action, drink or throw. The target may immediately move up to 25 ft. (no opportunity attacks).

name: Living Potion
description: As a bonus action, drink or throw at a target within 30 ft. Summon one Vine Blight (use MM stat block, 5 hp) as a friendly minion in each empty space adjacent to the target.

name: Hush Puppy
description: As an action, throw at a target within 60 ft. Hit: 2d8+3 bludgeoning damage and the target is silenced (cannot speak or cast verbal spells) until the end of its next turn.

name: Rage Stone
description: Hold or throw at a willing/unwilling target within 30 ft. (Wisdom DC 13 to resist). The target grows to Large size until the end of combat (advantages on Strength checks/saves, +1d4 damage on melee attacks, disadvantage on Dexterity saves).

name: Breath of Golestandt
description: As an action, throw this bottle at a 10-ft. radius area within 60 ft. All creatures in the area must immediately make a DC 15 Constitution death saving throw.

name: Love Potion
description: As an action, throw at a target within 30 ft. Hit: 2d6+3 psychic damage and the target is charmed by you (Wisdom DC 14 negates charm) until damaged or until end of combat.

name: Polymorph Potion
description: As a bonus action, drink or throw at a willing/unwilling target (Wisdom DC 15). The target transforms into a random beast (DM rolls on beast table, CR ≤ 1) until the end of combat. At the start of each round, the target may attempt a DC 15 Wisdom save to revert.

name: E.X.P. Elixir
description: As a bonus action, drink or throw. The target gains 4 additional bonus actions immediately. At the end of those actions, the target must make a DC 14 Constitution save or fall unconscious until the end of their next turn.

name: Freezing Bomb
description: As an action, throw this bomb at a target within 60 ft. Hit: 2d8+3 cold damage and the target is restrained (frozen) until the end of its next turn (DC 13 Constitution save negates frozen).

name: Shielding Potion (S3)
description: As a bonus action, drink or throw at a target. The target is immune to damage from the next single attack or ability used against them this round.

name: Purifying Water
description: As a bonus action, drink or throw at an ally. The target fully restores their hit points, clears all conditions, and regains one expended reaction.

name: Dragon Sand
description: As a bonus action, consume this substance. Your next action occurs three times simultaneously (each use expends its normal resources). After the first natural 1 you roll, you must make a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or fall unconscious until the end of your next turn.

name: Spell Scroll (1)
description: Draw one random spell scroll at character creation and add it to your inventory.

name: Two Spell Scrolls
description: Draw two random spell scrolls at character creation.

name: Three Spell Scrolls
description: Draw three random spell scrolls at character creation.

name: Specialty Spell Scroll
description: Draw one random spell scroll at character creation; receive 4 copies of that scroll.

name: Legendary Spell Scroll
description: Draw one random Legendary spell scroll at character creation.

name: Learn Magic
description: Draw one random spell of an element of your choice at character creation. Add it to your spell list permanently.

name: Wild Magic
description: Draw two random spells at character creation. Add them to your spell list permanently.

name: Best Friend
description: Draw one random Humanoid (Mercenary) Companion and add it to your companion slot.

name: Family Pet
description: Draw one random Beast Companion.

name: Magi Familiar
description: Draw one random Magical Companion.

name: Odd Ally
description: Draw one random Companion of any type.

name: Perfect Companion
description: Draw three random Companions; choose one to keep.

name: Entourage
description: Draw two random Humanoid Companions. Both are added to your companion slots.

name: Wild Pack
description: Draw two random Beast Companions.

name: Conjurer
description: Draw two random Magical Companions.

name: Veteran
description: Double the hit points granted by your class at character creation.

name: Prodigy
description: At the end of character creation, round your hit point maximum up to the nearest multiple of 10.

name: Class Ability
description: Gain one additional class feature from your class.

name: Random Class Ability
description: Draw a random class feature from three options of a randomly selected class.

name: Random Companion
description: Draw one random Companion of any type.

name: Random Attribute
description: Gain a random Attribute card. Attributes are not always beneficial. You may hold at most two Attributes.

name: Spell Scroll (generic)
description: Add one random spell scroll of any level to your inventory.

name: Psychic Strings
description: Replace all of your actions with three bonus actions each round (you have no action, only three bonus actions per turn).

name: Prodigy (S3)
description: Round your hit point maximum up to the nearest 10 at the end of character creation.

name: Righteous
description: Your attacks and spells cannot reduce a creature to 0 hit points unless you score a critical hit. After round 5, if the party reduces all enemies to 1 hit point or unconscious, combat ends as a Righteous Victory.

name: Diplomat
description: After round 5 of combat, you may interrupt combat to attempt a Persuasion check (DC set by DM) to convince enemies to stand down. Success ends combat without further violence.

name: Multiclass
description: Draw one random class. Replace your current class with it. You lose access to your original class features but gain access to the new class.

name: Instructor
description: Once at character creation or during the campaign, you may teach one of your known spells to another party member. They can cast it as if it were on their spell list.

name: Legend
description: You are renowned across the realm. +30 hit points. NPCs recognize your reputation; Charisma checks with common folk are made at advantage.

name: Forge Weapon
description: Draw 5 random weapons and choose one to keep. You are bound to that weapon — you cannot be disarmed and it is always considered masterwork (+1 to attack).

name: Forge Armor
description: Draw 5 random armor cards and choose one to keep.

name: Enchantments
description: All your weapon attacks deal double damage.

name: Banner of Courage
description: You and all party members deal double damage with weapon attacks while this banner is displayed in combat.

name: Ankh of Life
description: Once, when you would fail a death saving throw, you succeed instead. This ankh is then destroyed.

name: Mother's Gift
description: Draw one random magic item from the treasure table and add it to your inventory.

name: Inheritance
description: Draw three random magic items from the treasure table.

name: Pearl of Hindsight
description: Whenever you roll a natural 1, you do not lose your remaining actions for the round — you can still take your bonus action and reaction.

name: Giant
description: Your size becomes Large. You occupy a 10-ft. × 10-ft. space. Your weapon attacks deal an additional 1d6 damage and you have advantage on Strength checks. You have disadvantage on Dexterity saving throws.

name: Ogre Leather Cloak
description: You are immune to all conditions (charmed, frightened, paralyzed, poisoned, stunned, etc.). However, you cannot cast spells.

name: Heighten Senses
description: You are immune to the blinded condition. Your weapon attacks cannot be blocked or dodged by abilities that would negate them.

name: Protective Shades
description: You are immune to the blinded condition. When purchased at character creation, all other party members also receive a copy.

name: Burn Heal
description: You and your allies are immune to the burning condition.

name: Winter Coat of Protection
description: You are immune to the restrained condition from ice and freezing effects.

name: Winterstone Protection
description: You and all allies are immune to the restrained condition from ice and freezing effects.

name: Photographic Memory
description: You are immune to the silenced condition. Your spells cannot be counterspelled, blocked, or dodged.

name: Amulet of Bones (S3)
description: You and all allies are immune to the silenced condition.

name: Spider Eater
description: You are immune to the poisoned condition.

name: Snake Skin Bandages
description: You and all allies are immune to the poisoned condition.

name: Mind Heist Training
description: You are immune to the charmed condition.

name: Bag of Juicy Beetles
description: You are immune to the charmed condition. When purchased at character creation, all party members receive a copy.

name: Thug Kit
description: A duffel bag containing 3 random common/uncommon utility items (DM's discretion — examples: rope, smoke bombs, manacles, thieves' tools).

name: Bloody Ankh
description: Whenever you are attacked, roll a d20. On a 1, you gain the Demonic Possession condition (DM determines effect). On a 4 or lower, you must move toward and attack the nearest enemy with a melee attack this round. Paladins cannot attune to or willingly use this item.

name: Amulet of Bones (S1)
description: When damage would reduce you to 0 hit points, negate all of that damage instead. This item is then destroyed.

name: Spell Scroll (Righteous Fury)
description: Swing your weapon in a forward arc. Make a single attack roll. Hit: 3d8+5 bludgeoning damage to up to 3 targets in a line in front of you. Creatures with the Undead or Fiend type take 6d8+5 instead.

name: Scroll: Purify
description: A wave of radiant fire erupts in a 15-ft. cone. All creatures take 3d8 radiant damage (DC 14 Dex save for half). Undead and Fiends take 6d8 instead.

name: Scroll: Lay on Hands
description: Fully restore one target's hit points. If the target is Undead or a Fiend, deal 6d10 radiant damage instead (no save).

name: Scroll: Conversion
description: One creature within 30 ft. must succeed on a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw or be charmed by you permanently, unable to use dark magic (DM defines) while charmed. The charm ends when you die.

name: Scroll: Martyr
description: You are reduced to 1 hit point. Until the end of the round, no ally (other than you) can be reduced below 1 hit point or make death saving throws.

name: Scroll: Blessing of Strength
description: All allies deal double damage with weapon attacks until the end of combat. Even on a natural 1, all other party members still receive the buff.

name: Scroll: Hammer of Sanctification
description: A flaming hammer falls from the sky. All hostile Undead and Fiends on the battlefield take 6d8 radiant damage (DC 15 Constitution save for half). All other hostile creatures take 1d8 radiant damage.

name: Scroll: Divine Intervention
description: Force any creature to immediately reroll one die roll (cannot be used on natural 1s or 20s). This scroll can be used at any point, even outside your turn.

name: Scroll: Quick Cast
description: Cast any one spell you know as a bonus action immediately. On a roll of 15 or higher, that spell automatically critically hits.

name: Scroll: Conjure Magic
description: Choose an element. Draw one random spell of that element from the DM's table. Cast it immediately as a bonus action. On a success, the spell is added to your spell list permanently.

name: Scroll: Yodel
description: Emit a thunderous yodel. One creature within 30 ft. takes 4d8+4 thunder damage (DC 14 Constitution save for half) and is silenced until the end of its next turn. The yodel can bounce off solid walls — you choose the direction.

name: Scroll: Midstrike
description: All your linked minions immediately make one weapon attack against any adjacent enemy (no roll needed from you, minion uses its own attack bonus).

name: Scroll: Serenity
description: Until the end of the round, all damage dealt to you and your allies by enemies instead restores that much HP.

name: Scroll: Acqueous Form
description: Until the end of the round, you are immune to all non-magical damage. Outside of combat, you can maintain this form to squeeze through openings, hide in containers, or breathe underwater.

name: Scroll: Witching Hour
description: Time freezes briefly. All party members gain one bonus action, which they hold simultaneously. When time unfreezes, all bonus actions resolve at once.

name: Scroll: Enrage Fate
description: Force any creature to reroll one die roll (not natural 1s or 20s). Instead of rolling 1 die, they roll 6d20 and use the average result. Effects are chaotic and DM-arbitrated.

name: Scroll: Sea Shanty
description: Until the end of the round, whenever an ally scores a critical hit or critical failure, you gain a bonus action.

name: Scroll: Grand Finale
description: Each party member (including you) gains one bonus action that can be used to activate a limited-use class feature that has already been expended in this combat.

name: Scroll: Law of the Land
description: Declare one Law (DM must not allow enemies to move this round). If a rule violation occurs, you gain a bonus action. Only one Law may be active at a time.

name: Scroll: Law of the Body
description: All enemy attacks deal a maximum of 10 damage this round. If violated, you fully restore your hit points.

name: Scroll: Law of the Times
description: All enemy attacks are no-roll (automatic hits) this round. In exchange, all enemy actions are at minimum effect. If violated, regain one reaction.

name: Scroll: Law of the Mind
description: Enemies cannot cast spells this round. If violated, cast one random spell as a bonus action.

name: Scroll: Nourish Animation
description: All friendly minions immediately duplicate (one duplicate appears in an adjacent space, linked to you). Elemental minions cannot duplicate.

name: Scroll: Prismglass
description: Mold sand or glass into a Prismglass gemstone worth 50 gp. Purely a crafting/trade item.

name: Scroll: Jollyroger
description: Grant one creature within 30 ft. 3 bonus actions, each decided by you. The target may attempt a DC 13 Wisdom save before each action to resist your direction.

name: Scroll: Blood Oath Contract
description: Form a magical blood oath with one willing ally. Breaking the oath deals 4d10 necrotic damage to the oathbreaker. You must complete the contract once begun or make a DC 15 Constitution death saving throw.

name: Scroll: Haunt
description: Project a spectral copy of yourself anywhere on the battlefield. Make one weapon attack through the copy (use your attack bonus). If you are dead, you may use this scroll once per round until the end of the campaign.

name: Scroll: Final Light
description: Resurrect one fallen ally briefly. They return to life until the end of the round. During this time they may distribute any of their items to party members and cast one spell as a bonus action. They then pass on permanently.

name: Turtle Droppings
description: A bag of stale catapult turtle droppings. Has no mechanical use. May be used as projectile ammunition (1 bludgeoning damage, 20-ft. throw) or as a distraction.

name: Tomato
description: A rotten tomato. Can be thrown at a creature as a bonus action. The target has disadvantage on Charisma checks until it wipes the tomato off (bonus action).

name: Applejuice
description: A jar of sentient apple juice. At a moment of the DM's choosing, it animates and attempts to attack the holder (1d6 bludgeoning, +3 to hit). Best kept sealed.

name: Carriage Wheel
description: A large, heavy wheel. Your movement speed is reduced by 5 ft. while carrying it. Could be rolled at things.

name: Can of Blood
description: A tin of unknown blood. If consumed, make a DC 14 Constitution death saving throw.

name: Pamphlet About 'Goblin Rights'
description: Goblins who see you carrying this pamphlet start with a friendly disposition toward you.

name: X-Bow Grappler
description: As an action, fire a bola at a creature's legs within 60 ft. The creature takes 1d6 piercing damage per leg it has (typically 2d6) and is stunned until freed (Strength DC 15, or an ally's action). Immunities to the stunned condition do not apply.

name: Spellnade
description: As an action, throw this spell-grenade at a single target within 60 ft. Draw 6 random spells and cast all of them as bonus actions targeting that creature. You may swap one of the 6 spells for another random draw.

name: Worthless Dwarven Trinket
description: Once per campaign, spend 10 minutes studying this trinket and roll on the campaign's legendary item table. On a natural 1, this trinket itself becomes your legendary item (DM determines its properties).

name: Mistaken Identity
description: When first meeting anyone, they assume you are a famous NPC from the campaign setting. You may exploit this for advantage on social checks. If discovered, those creatures are hostile to you and call you a fraud.

name: Blood Drinker
description:
This weapon has a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls. Whenever you hit a creature with it, you regain 3 hit points.
"The blade thirsts as surely as the hand that holds it."
originalText: Blood Drinker Rare Weapon (any sword) [requires attunement]

name: Warp Blade
description: This weapon has a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls. Whenever you hit a creature with this weapon, you can immediately teleport up to 15 feet to an unoccupied space you can see as a free action.
originalText: Warp Blade Uncommon Weapon (any sword) [requires attunement]

name: Dwarven Runeblade
description:
This weapon has a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls. It deals an additional 1d6 damage when wielded by a dwarf. Whenever you reduce a creature to 0 hit points with this weapon, you may make one additional attack with it as a bonus action.
"The runes carved into its blade are said to record every kill made in its name."
originalText: Dwarven Runeblade Rare Weapon (longsword) [requires attunement by a dwarf]

name: Dulled Vorpal Slayer
description:
This weapon has a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls. When you score a critical hit against a creature that is not a Construct or Undead, you can force it to make a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or it is instantly slain. On a success it instead takes an additional 4d6 damage. Against creatures deemed too important by the DM, the instant kill becomes an additional 6d6 damage instead.
"It's definitely not a Vorpal blade. Anyone who tells you otherwise is lying."
originalText: Dulled Vorpal Slayer Very Rare Weapon (any sword) [requires attunement]

name: Grimshade Blade
description:
This weapon has a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls. On a critical hit, it deals an additional 4d8 necrotic damage. On a critical fail, this item is destroyed and a CR 10 Shadow Demon bound to kill you is conjured in an adjacent space.
"Power has a price. This blade collects."
originalText: Grimshade Blade Very Rare Weapon (any sword) [requires attunement]

name: Headhunter Axe
description: This weapon has a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls. On a critical hit, the target must make a DC 14 Constitution saving throw. On a failure, it is decapitated (if it has a head). Constructs and creatures without discernible anatomy are immune.

name: Lirudna Blade
description:
This white-gold blade has a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls. As an action, you can make a single attack roll against two adjacent targets simultaneously. On a critical failure, the blade shatters.
"White gold is decorative for a reason."

name: Muddy Billhook
description: This weapon has a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls. On a critical hit, the target loses the use of one of their limbs (DM's discretion) until they receive a Greater Restoration spell.

name: Smokey Naginata
description: This weapon has a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls. Its blade is so keenly edged that its melee attacks pierce through to all creatures in a 5-foot line behind the primary target, dealing the same damage to each.

name: Nobleborn Knife
description:
This weapon has a +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls. After you hit a creature with it, the knife must be cleaned as a bonus action before it can be used to attack again. When you hit with a melee attack from this weapon, the target must make a DC 15 Constitution saving throw or be forced to make a death saving throw.
"Only the very rich can afford to stab someone this much and stop to clean the blade."

name: Shadowshade
description: This weapon has a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls. Whenever you hit a creature with this weapon, you summon a Shadowy Apparition (use Shadow stat block, 1 hp) as a familiar in an adjacent space. It acts on your initiative, moves on command, and attacks for 1d4 necrotic damage.

name: Convoluted Composite Crossbow
description:
This crossbow has a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls and deals 6d6 piercing damage on a hit. It is so complex to reload that it can only be reloaded outside of combat, requiring a Short Rest and a DC 14 Dexterity (Thieves' Tools or Tinker's Tools) check.
"Seventeen loading steps. The manual is a pamphlet. Good luck."
originalText: Convoluted Composite Crossbow Rare Weapon (heavy crossbow)

name: Dragonskin Bow
description: This weapon has a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls. On a critical hit, it deals triple damage instead of double.

name: Heartbark Crossbow
description: This weapon has a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls. On a hit, the target is pushed up to 15 feet directly away from you.

name: Lunar Boomerang
description: As an action, you can throw this boomerang to strike up to three targets within 30 feet, provided the flight path forms a logical arc. Make a separate attack roll for each target. The boomerang returns to your hand at the end of your turn.

name: Blunt Saxophone
description:
This weapon has a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls. Immediately before striking a creature, you can play a dissonant chord (no action required). Until the start of your next turn, you and all allies within 30 feet deal an additional 1d6 damage with weapon attacks.
"Music, they said. It heals the soul. It also breaks bones."

name: Raskum Claws
description: While wearing these claws, your unarmed strikes deal 1d8 slashing damage. As an action you can sweep both claws in a wide arc, hitting all creatures adjacent to you with a single attack roll.

name: Lieutenant Surge
description: This weapon has a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls. On a hit, an arc of lightning leaps from the target to up to two other creatures within 15 feet, dealing 1d6 lightning damage to each (no attack roll required for the arc).

name: Duskblade
description: This weapon has a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls. When you hit a creature with it, all other creatures within 5 feet of the target also take the weapon's damage.

name: Hammer of Light
description: This weapon has a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls. On a critical hit, you cast Lay on Hands (as the paladin feature) on yourself or an ally within 5 feet, restoring 10 hit points.
originalText: Hammer of Light Uncommon Weapon (warhammer) [requires attunement by a cleric or paladin]

name: Titanium Greatsword
description: This weapon has a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls. On a critical hit, it deals triple damage instead of double.

name: Double Edge
description:
This weapon has a +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls. Whenever you hit a creature with it, you also deal 1d10 slashing damage to yourself. The tighter your grip, the deeper it cuts.
"Of course it hurts. That's the point."

name: Death Scythe
description:
While attuned to this weapon, your hit point maximum is halved. This weapon has a +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls. Whenever you hit a creature, you regain hit points equal to the damage dealt.
"You give a little. You take a lot."
originalText: Death Scythe Very Rare Weapon (glaive) [requires attunement]

name: Ice Pick
description: This rapier is bitterly cold to the touch. It has a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls. You have advantage on spell attack rolls for cold spells while holding it. When you roll a natural 18 or higher on an attack roll with this weapon, you can cast a known or random cold spell as a bonus action without expending a spell slot.

name: Offhand Assassin's Dagger
description: This light weapon has a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls. Whenever you hit a creature with a different weapon on your turn, you can make one additional attack with this dagger as a bonus action.

name: Elaphelk Horn Staff
description: This staff has a +2 bonus to spell attack rolls. Spells cast through this staff that target a single creature instead affect all creatures within 15 feet of the target.
originalText: Elaphelk Horn Staff Rare Staff (requires attunement by a spellcaster) [requires attunement]

name: Leaders' Heartoak Staff
description: This staff has a +1 bonus to spell attack rolls. Choose one spell you know — that spell costs no spell slots when cast through this staff. Additionally, creatures friendly to you within 60 feet have advantage on saving throws against being frightened.
originalText: Leaders' Heartoak Staff Uncommon Staff [requires attunement by a spellcaster]

name: Nova Plume Staff
description: As an action, launch a burst of fiery smoke at a creature within 60 feet. The target takes 3d6 fire damage on a failed DC 14 Dexterity saving throw, or half on a success. All spaces within 5 feet of the target become heavily obscured until the end of your next turn.

name: Bolt Staff
description: This staff has 3 charges, regaining all charges at dawn. As an action, expend 1 charge to call down a bolt of lightning on a target within 60 feet. The target takes 3d10 lightning damage and is stunned until the end of its next turn on a failed DC 14 Constitution saving throw, or half damage and no stun on a success.
originalText: Bolt Staff Uncommon Staff [requires attunement by a spellcaster]

name: Bone Herald's Staff
description: This staff has a +1 bonus to spell attack rolls. All area-of-effect spells you cast have their radius or dimensions increased by 10 feet.
originalText: Bone Herald's Staff Uncommon Staff [requires attunement by a spellcaster]

name: Lifetapper
description: This wand has 5 charges, regaining 1d4+1 charges at dawn. As an action, expend 1 charge to deal 2d8 necrotic damage to a living creature within 30 feet (no saving throw). You regain hit points equal to the necrotic damage dealt. This effect has no benefit if the target is Undead or a Construct.

name: Miny Masty Duplicator
description: As an action, wave this wand to duplicate each friendly summoned creature you control. Each duplicate appears in an adjacent unoccupied space and acts on the same initiative. Duplicates vanish at the end of combat.
originalText: Miny Masty Duplicator Rare Wand [requires attunement]

name: Needle of Fury
description: This wand has a +2 bonus to spell attack rolls. Whenever you or an ally uses their reaction, you can cast one spell you know as a bonus action.
originalText: Needle of Fury Rare Wand [requires attunement by a spellcaster]

name: Nether Berry Branch
description: While attuned to this wand, you can cast any prepared spell from an ally who is within 30 feet of you, using your spell slots and spellcasting ability. The ally is unaware their spells are being siphoned.
originalText: Nether Berry Branch Rare Wand [requires attunement by a spellcaster]

name: Restoration Staff
description: This staff has 7 charges, regaining 1d6+1 charges at dawn. As an action, expend 1 charge to restore 2d6+4 hit points to yourself or a creature within 30 feet. If the creature is unconscious, expend 2 charges to stabilize and restore them to 1 hit point, then grant them a bonus action.
originalText: Restoration Staff Uncommon Staff [requires attunement by a cleric or druid]

name: Wand of Direction
description: This wand has 5 charges, regaining all charges at dawn. As an action, expend a charge to force a creature within 30 feet to move up to 25 feet to a space of your choosing (Strength DC 13 to resist). On a roll of 11 or higher, you also gain a free bonus action this turn.

name: Amplification Wand
description: As a bonus action, shout a taunt through this sound-amplifying wand. All hostile creatures within 60 feet that can hear it must succeed on a DC 12 Wisdom saving throw or be forced to target you with their next attack.

name: Drunken Magician's Wand
description:
Whenever you cast a spell using this wand, a second random spell (DM's choice, rolled on a spell table) is also cast targeting the same creature or area.
"Results may vary. Liability waived."
originalText: Drunken Magician's Wand Rare Wand [requires attunement by a spellcaster]

name: Memory Manipulator
description: On a critical hit or critical failure with a spell attack, you forget that spell and immediately learn a random spell of the same level, which replaces it permanently.
originalText: Memory Manipulator Rare Wand [requires attunement by a spellcaster]

name: Archmage Staff
description: This staff has a +3 bonus to spell attack rolls and spell save DC. Spells cast through this staff never miss unless you roll a natural 1.
originalText: Archmage Staff Very Rare Staff [requires attunement by a spellcaster]

name: Storm Hammer
description: This weapon has a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls. Whenever you cast a spell, a target of your choice within 30 feet gains temporary hit points equal to the spell's cost in spell slots × 5.
originalText: Storm Hammer Uncommon Warhammer, requires attunement [requires attunement]

name: Karazzim Bo Staff
description: This staff has a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls. Whenever you take a reaction, you or an ally within 30 feet regains 1d6+2 hit points.
originalText: Karazzim Bo Staff Uncommon Staff [requires attunement]

name: Adamantine Armor
description:
This suit of armor is reinforced with adamantine. While wearing it, any critical hit against you becomes a normal hit.
"It does not bend. Ever."
originalText: Adamantine Armor Uncommon Armor (medium or heavy, not hide)

name: Armor of Resolve
description: While wearing this armor, attack rolls against you have a −2 penalty whenever your hit points are at or below half your hit point maximum.
originalText: Armor of Resolve Uncommon Armor (breastplate) [requires attunement]

name: Statistician's Coat
description: Once per combat as an action, you can mark a target. Until the end of your next turn, any roll of 15 or higher against that target counts as a critical hit, and any roll of 5 or lower becomes a normal hit.

name: Drunk Master Robe
description: While wearing these robes, whenever a ranged weapon attack or spell attack targets you, roll on a spell table (DM's discretion); that randomly determined spell targets you instead of the original attack.
originalText: Drunk Master Robe Rare Armor (robe) [requires attunement]

name: Energy Vest
description: At the start of each of your turns, you gain 12 temporary hit points.

name: Colorful Lycra Suit
description:
At the start of each of your turns, you gain one use of your reaction, even if you have already used it this round.
"It is eye-catching. This is both a strength and a liability."
originalText: Colorful Lycra Suit Common Wondrous item [requires attunement]

name: Thick Fur Raiments
description: While wearing these garments, all damage you take is halved (rounded down).
originalText: Thick Fur Raiments Rare Armor (hide) [requires attunement]

name: Fiery Regalia
description: While wearing this armor, difficult terrain costs you no extra movement, and you are immune to the effects of burning environmental hazards and lava terrain.

name: Rokesh Pantsuit
description:
When you would be reduced to 0 hit points, this item is destroyed and your hit points are instead restored to their maximum.
"It looks good. It keeps you alive. Order of importance is debatable."

name: Beastal Warplate
description: While wearing this armor, your bonded companion also gains the armor's AC bonus and hit point bonus.

name: Makeshift Armor
description: This armor grants a +1 bonus to AC for every magic item you have attuned, including this one.

name: Ytt Transversing Leather
description: Whenever a critical hit is made against you, your race is randomly changed (DM's choice from available races). Your ability scores and maximum hit points do not change.
originalText: Ytt Transversing Leather Rare Armor (leather) [requires attunement]

name: Midas Plate
description: When you acquire this armor, you may spend any amount of gold. For every 100 gold spent, your hit point maximum increases by 2.

name: Buckaroo Vest
description: While wearing this vest, each of your class features with a limited number of daily uses can be used one additional time per day.

name: Incanter's Jacket
description: Whenever you use a spell scroll, you regain 12 hit points.
originalText: Incanter's Jacket Uncommon Armor (any) [requires attunement by a spellcaster]

name: Clockwork Vest
description: While wearing this vest, you may take a reaction on every creature's turn in addition to your own.

name: Merchant Trenchcoat
description: At any time, you or an ally may purchase a random magic item (rolled on a treasure table) from the coat's pockets for 500 gold, then immediately give it to any ally.

name: Master Magician's Robes
description: Whenever a ranged spell attack targets you, you can use your reaction to transform it into a different random spell of the same level, which then targets you instead.
originalText: Master Magician's Robes Very Rare Armor (robe) [requires attunement by a spellcaster]

name: Mirror Shield
description: This shield has a mirrored surface. When a projectile or ranged spell attack is made against you, you can use your reaction to make a DC 14 Dexterity check. On a success, the attack is reflected back at the attacker using the same attack roll.

name: Obsidian Wall
description: Critical hits against you do not deal bonus damage while you are wielding this shield; they are treated as normal hits.

name: Regrowth Magic Guard
description: Whenever you cast a spell, you gain 6 temporary hit points.
originalText: Regrowth Magic Guard Uncommon Shield [requires attunement by a spellcaster]

name: Living Shield
description: Whenever you take damage, you gain 3 temporary hit points.

name: Steel Spiked Shield
description: Whenever a creature within 5 feet hits you with a melee attack, it takes 3 piercing damage.
originalText: Steel Spiked Shield Uncommon Shield [requires attunement]

name: Moonglow Shield
description: At the start of combat, all allies who do not have a shield gain temporary hit points equal to your shield's AC bonus × 5.

name: Midas Shield
description: At any time, you may spend 100 gold to regain 3 hit points.

name: Sacrificial Guard
description: The first critical hit you take while wielding this shield is reduced to a normal hit. This shield is then destroyed.

name: Heartwall Locket
description: Whenever you or an ally scores a critical hit, you can use your reaction to restore 6 hit points to any creature within 60 feet.
originalText: Heartwall Locket Uncommon Wondrous item (locket) [requires attunement]

name: Pattenborrow's Necklace
description: While wearing this necklace, you are immune to damage from spells. The necklace is very fragile — if you fail a Dexterity saving throw, it may shatter (DM's discretion).

name: Necklace of Bazang
description:
While wearing this necklace, your critical hits become critical failures, and your critical failures become critical hits. This curse cannot be removed by anything short of a Wish spell.
"Cursed. Obviously."
originalText: Necklace of Bazang Rare Amulet (cursed) [requires attunement]

name: Ring of Fire
description: As an action, unleash a wave of fire from this ring in a 5-foot-wide, 30-foot line. Each creature in the line must make a DC 14 Dexterity saving throw, taking 3d8 fire damage on a failure, or half on a success. You also take half the damage you deal.
originalText: Ring of Fire Uncommon Ring [requires attunement]

name: Ring of the Armsukaa
description: As an action, you can project an expanding magical barrier centered on yourself. Allies may move and attack freely through it, but hostile creatures cannot enter and all ranged attacks against creatures within the barrier are blocked until the barrier has absorbed a total of 50 damage. The barrier lasts until the start of your next turn or until destroyed.
originalText: Ring of the Armsukaa Rare Ring [requires attunement]

name: Hypnoring
description: As an action, target a creature within 30 feet with an Intelligence of 8 or less. The creature must succeed on a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw or be charmed by you until this ring is destroyed or you attempt to charm another creature with it.

name: Crystalline Amulet
description: Whenever you miss with a spell attack, you can reroll the attack, adding one additional die to the roll each time you reroll. You may do this any number of times.
originalText: Crystalline Amulet Uncommon Amulet [requires attunement by a spellcaster]

name: Twin Dragon Amulet
description: When you acquire this item, a second copy is created for an ally. Both wearers can transfer hit points or bonus actions to each other at will as a free action on their turn.
originalText: Twin Dragon Amulet Rare Amulet (pair) [requires attunement]

name: Friendship Ring
description:
While wearing this ring, you are immune to all damage dealt by your allies.
"Accidents happen. This ring acknowledges that."

name: Balanced Bracelet
description: While wearing this bracelet, you are immune to the stunned, paralyzed, and restrained conditions.
originalText: Balanced Bracelet Uncommon Wondrous item (bracelet) [requires attunement]

name: Scented Candle
description: While this candle burns in your possession, you are immune to the charmed and frightened conditions, and to all mind-reading and emotional manipulation effects.
originalText: Scented Candle Common Wondrous item [requires attunement]

name: Laughing Amulet
description:
Once per encounter, you can attempt to deliver the most cutting one-liner or taunt applicable to the current situation (DM's judgment). If it lands, you regain all hit points. If it doesn't, you take 4d6 fire and psychic damage.
"The universe appreciates a good punchline. Usually."

name: Swift Feather Boots
description: While wearing these boots, your walking speed increases to 50 feet and your sprint speed increases to 60 feet.
originalText: Swift Feather Boots Uncommon Wondrous item (boots) [requires attunement]

name: Hiking Boots
description: While wearing these boots, difficult terrain costs you no extra movement. You cannot be pushed or knocked prone by forced movement.

name: Rocket Boots
description: Once per combat as a bonus action, you blast forward in a straight line up to 60 feet. You pass through any creature's space along the path, dealing 4d6 fire damage to each (DC 13 Dexterity saving throw for half). Every space you travel transforms into difficult terrain (fire) until the end of your next turn.
originalText: Rocket Boots Rare Wondrous item (boots) [requires attunement]

name: Statue's Sole
description: As an action, plant yourself in place to generate a barrier of force around you with hit points equal to your hit point maximum. The barrier absorbs all damage before you do. While the barrier is active, your speed becomes 0.
originalText: Statue's Sole Rare Wondrous item (boots) [requires attunement]

name: Mechasurfer
description: Whenever an ally moves, you can use your reaction to move up to 15 feet. Whenever you move on your turn, one adjacent ally can move up to 15 feet alongside you.

name: Everfull Goblet
description:
This goblet attunes to the first potion of Common or Uncommon rarity poured into it by the attuned creature. That potion becomes inexhaustible — the attuned creature can drink from it as a bonus action any number of times, regaining its benefits each time.
"It is always full. Always."
originalText: Everfull Goblet Uncommon Wondrous item [requires attunement]

name: Holy Canteen
description: A canteen blessed by a divine caster. As an action, drinking from this canteen fully restores your hit points. The canteen can be refilled at any drinkable holy water source or with a 1st-level spell slot and a short rest.

name: Sylvan Leaf
description: Your hit point maximum permanently increases by 3. As a reaction, if damage would reduce you to 0 hit points and you still have the leaf, you can consume it to restore all your hit points instead.

name: Invisibility Potion
description: As a bonus action, drink this potion to become invisible for 1 hour or until the end of combat. The invisibility is not broken by attacking or casting spells. It ends early if any ally drops to 0 hit points.

name: Invisibility Cloak
description: As a bonus action, you vanish. While invisible, you remain hidden even when you attack or cast spells. The invisibility ends if you take damage or if any ally is reduced to 0 hit points.
originalText: Invisibility Cloak Rare Wondrous item (cloak) [requires attunement]

name: Elven Sugar Cookies
description: As a bonus action, eat one cookie to gain an additional action until the end of combat. You can use this additional action only to take the Attack (one weapon attack), Dash, Disengage, or Use an Object action.
originalText: Elven Sugar Cookies Uncommon Wondrous item (consumable)

name: Thor's Ale
description: As an action, splash an ally within 5 feet with this ale. If the target is at 0 hit points, they regain 2d10+5 hit points and gain a bonus action. If the ally is conscious, they are instead charmed and act erratically at the start of their next turn.

name: Potion Seller's Strongest Potion
description:
As a bonus action, drink this potion. Until the end of combat, your weapon attacks deal double damage. On a critical hit, your weapon attacks deal triple damage.
"You can't handle his strongest potions. But he'll sell them to you anyway."
originalText: Potion Seller's Strongest Potion Rare Potion (consumable)

name: E.X.P.
description: As a bonus action, consume this vial to gain 5 bonus actions immediately. At the start of each subsequent round, make a DC 13 Constitution saving throw or fall unconscious until the end of your next turn.

name: Second Chance Candy
description: As an action, fully restore all allies' hit points and temporary hit points, and reset all expended class features limited by a long rest.
originalText: Second Chance Candy Very Rare Wondrous item (consumable)

name: Holding Spell in a Bottle
description: As an action, throw this bottle at a surface. Roll a die; all party members regain hit points equal to the result.
originalText: Holding Spell in a Bottle Uncommon Wondrous item (consumable)

name: Desdonian Firebombs
description: As an action, hurl one of these bombs at a point within 60 feet. Each creature within 10 feet must make a DC 14 Dexterity saving throw, taking 5d6 fire damage on a failure, or half on a success. The area becomes burning difficult terrain until the end of your next turn.

name: Bag of Holding
description: This bag's interior space is larger than its outside dimensions. It can hold up to 500 pounds of material without increasing in weight or size, and holds no limit on the number of items stored within.
originalText: Bag of Holding Uncommon Wondrous item

name: Monocle of Magic Sight
description: While wearing this monocle, you can see the auras of magic items and spells within 30 feet. As an action, the DM reveals the maximum hit points of one creature you can see.
originalText: Monocle of Magic Sight Uncommon Wondrous item [requires attunement]

name: Dungeoneer's Encyclopedia
description: As an action, consult this tome. The DM answers one yes/no question about the current situation, or reveals the maximum hit points of one creature you can see.

name: Book of Faces
description: As an action, look into this book to change your face to that of any creature you have seen in the last 30 hours. This effect is magical and provides a true disguise. If you do not revert to your original face within 30 hours, your original face is lost permanently.
originalText: Book of Faces Rare Wondrous item [requires attunement]

name: Mask of Echoes
description: As a bonus action after killing a creature, put on this mask to appear as that creature. The disguise is visual only (voice, size, and mannerisms are not replicated). Only works on creatures of a similar size to you.
originalText: Mask of Echoes Uncommon Wondrous item (mask) [requires attunement]

name: Grappling Hook
description: As an action, fire this hook at a target within 60 feet. Either the target is pulled toward you as far as possible, or you are pulled toward the target. If the target is pulled adjacent to you, you can immediately make one weapon attack against them as a bonus action.

name: Neural Link Gun
description: As an action, target a creature within 60 feet that you can see. The target makes a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw. On a failure, you control the creature's next action, choosing any action available to it (including attacks). The controlled creature expends its own resources.
originalText: Neural Link Gun Rare Wondrous item [requires attunement]

name: Hourglass of the Sandbold
description: As an action, shatter this hourglass. Until the end of combat, all hostile creatures lose the ability to take reactions.
originalText: Hourglass of the Sandbold Rare Wondrous item (consumable)

name: Pocket Portal Device
description: As a bonus action, teleport to any unoccupied space within 60 feet that you can see. If the destination space is occupied, you swap places with its occupant instead. This item cannot be activated in response to an incoming attack.
originalText: Pocket Portal Device Rare Wondrous item [requires attunement]

name: Deconstructor Manabomber
description: As an action, sacrifice a magic item you own to power this bomb. All creatures within 20 feet of a point you choose within 60 feet must make a DC 16 Dexterity saving throw, taking 10d6 force damage on a failure, or half on a success.
originalText: Deconstructor Manabomber Very Rare Wondrous item (consumable)

name: Hole Puncher
description: As an action, fire this slingshot at any non-living, non-magical wall within 30 feet. It bores a perfectly cylindrical 5-foot-diameter tunnel up to 15 feet deep.

name: Deflex
description: When you are the target of a ranged spell attack or ranged weapon attack, you can use your reaction to redirect it to any other target within range of the original attack.

name: Behemoth Arm
description: Your arm is replaced with a monstrous mechanical limb. Your unarmed strikes deal 2d8 bludgeoning damage, have a reach of 15 feet, and never miss (they auto-hit unless the target has total cover). As a bonus action, you can use the arm to move on your turn instead of using your movement. This modification is permanent and counts as a cursed item.
originalText: Behemoth Arm Very Rare Wondrous item (cursed) [requires attunement]

name: Eyes of N'locnil
description:
Your eyes are replaced with demonic orbs. All spell slots and class feature resource costs are reduced to zero. Your original eyes are lost permanently.
"You see everything. Everything sees you."
originalText: Eyes of N'locnil Very Rare Wondrous item (cursed) [requires attunement]

name: Aetheral Form
description: As a bonus action, shift into an ethereal state. While ethereal, you can move through solid objects and creatures as if they were difficult terrain. You cannot end your turn inside a solid object.
originalText: Aetheral Form Very Rare Wondrous item [requires attunement]

name: Flexible Limbs
description: Your body stretches like rubber. The reach of all your melee attacks and melee abilities increases to 15 feet.
originalText: Flexible Limbs Rare Wondrous item (cursed) [requires attunement]

name: Arcana Sight
description: You now cast spells through your eyes rather than your hands. Spell scrolls are no longer consumable for you and can be cast any number of times.
originalText: Arcana Sight Very Rare Wondrous item [requires attunement by a spellcaster]

name: Mirror Image (Treasure)
description: You permanently have an exact duplicate of yourself. Both copies move simultaneously and share your actions. For all purposes you are both characters at once. If either copy is killed, you die.
originalText: Mirror Image (Treasure) Legendary Wondrous item (cursed) [requires attunement]

name: Mind Fist
description: You can make ranged unarmed strikes against any target on the battlefield using psychokinetic force, dealing 1d10+5 bludgeoning damage. Range: unlimited within line of sight.
originalText: Mind Fist Rare Wondrous item [requires attunement]

name: Lethal Arms
description: One of your hands is replaced with one of your weapons. That weapon becomes cursed and cannot be removed. Your attack rolls with that weapon have a +2 bonus and its base damage increases to 2d8.
originalText: Lethal Arms Very Rare Wondrous item (cursed) [requires attunement]

name: Kobold Rabies

name: Sorcerer's Stone
description: When you first attune to this stone, choose one spell from the sorcerer spell list of 5th level or lower. You can cast that spell at will without expending a spell slot, using it as if it were a cantrip.
originalText: Sorcerer's Stone Rare Wondrous item [requires attunement by a spellcaster]

name: Masterful Ruby
description: When you attune to this ruby, choose one class feature that has a limited number of uses. That feature no longer expends any uses.
originalText: Masterful Ruby Rare Wondrous item [requires attunement]

name: Emerald of Persistence
description: When you miss with a weapon attack, you can immediately make one additional attack against the same target as a bonus action. You cannot trigger this effect from an attack made as a result of this item.
originalText: Emerald of Persistence Uncommon Wondrous item [requires attunement]

name: Believer Stone
description: At the start of combat, this stone transforms into a random magic item (DM rolls on the magic item table). At the end of combat, it reverts to the Believer Stone.
originalText: Believer Stone Uncommon Wondrous item [requires attunement]

name: The Magician's Stone
description: At the start of combat, this stone transforms into a random spell ability (DM's choice, appropriate level). You can cast that spell once before the stone reverts at the end of combat.
originalText: The Magician's Stone Uncommon Wondrous item [requires attunement by a spellcaster]

name: Coin of Providence
description: Once per combat, instead of making an attack roll, ability check, or saving throw, you can flip this coin. Heads: you automatically score a critical success. Tails: you automatically critically fail.

name: Branded Pain of Fortune
description: Whenever you roll a 1 on an attack roll, ability check, or saving throw, the result is treated as a 20 instead. However, whenever a natural 1 is avoided this way, your hit point maximum is permanently reduced by 5.
originalText: Branded Pain of Fortune Rare Wondrous item (cursed) [requires attunement]

name: Bewitching Mirror
description: As an action, reveal this mirror to a creature within 30 feet. The creature must succeed on a DC 15 Charisma saving throw or be trapped inside the mirror, removing it from combat. If the mirror is broken, the creature is released and the mirror destroyed. Very powerful creatures or those with strong willpower have advantage on the saving throw.

name: Soul Puppet
description: As an action, use this puppet on the body of a dead ally or enemy. The creature's soul is bound to the puppet. It can speak, think, and animate the puppet, but cannot take any other actions. The soul persists until the puppet is destroyed.
originalText: Soul Puppet Very Rare Wondrous item [requires attunement]

name: Transmogifer
description: As an action, you transform into a random creature (DM rolls on a monster table, CR appropriate to the encounter). You gain that creature's abilities for the duration of combat. You return to your original form at combat's end.

name: Duplication Orb
description: As an action, duplicate one magic item in your or an ally's possession. Both the original and the duplicate become bound to you — they cannot be given away or destroyed. Both turn to dust upon your death.

name: Chipped Prism
description: When you cast a targeted spell, you can channel it through the Prism to cast it twice simultaneously. The Prism shatters after use. Limited spells remain limited.

name: Bloodlust Book
description: As an action, read from this book. Until the start of your next turn, you, your allies, and your summoned creatures deal double damage with weapon attacks.

name: Chronomina Maxer Clock
description: As a bonus action, activate this device to vanish from the battlefield. At the end of the round, you reappear in any unoccupied space within your original movement speed and gain 3 bonus actions to use immediately.
originalText: Chronomina Maxer Clock Very Rare Wondrous item [requires attunement]

name: Wind Tour Scroll

name: Swirly Umbrella
description: As an action, twirl this umbrella at a creature within 30 feet. The target must succeed on a DC 15 Wisdom saving throw or be charmed by you until the end of combat.
originalText: Swirly Umbrella Rare Wondrous item [requires attunement]

name: Grimshade Blade (Ability Version)
description: As an action, smite a target for 6d10 necrotic damage. On a critical failure, the blade is destroyed and a Shadow Demon with hit points equal to 10× the DM's chosen CR (minimum CR 10) is summoned, bound only to kill you.
originalText: Grimshade Blade (Ability Version) Legendary Wondrous item [requires attunement]

name: Headhunter Axe (Ability Version)
description: As an action, hurl this axe at a target within 30 feet for 5d10 slashing damage. On a critical hit, the target must make a DC 17 Constitution saving throw or be decapitated.
originalText: Headhunter Axe (Ability Version) Rare Wondrous item [requires attunement]

name: Power Leveler
description: As an action, inject an ally with this device. The target immediately gains 4 bonus actions. At the end of those actions, the target must make a DC 14 Constitution saving throw or fall unconscious until the end of their next turn.

name: Trusty Trumpet
description: As a bonus action, play a rousing melody. Until the start of your next turn, all allies within 60 feet that can hear you cannot miss on attack rolls (except on a natural 1).
originalText: Trusty Trumpet Uncommon Wondrous item [requires attunement by a bard]

name: Tome of Slime Walls

name: Ice Lancer

originalText: Ice Lancer Uncommon Wondrous item [requires attunement]

name: Frost Bomb

name: Glacial Prisonator
description: As an action, blast a target within 60 feet for 6d8 cold damage (DC 15 Dexterity saving throw for half). On a failed save, a 10-foot column of ice erupts in every unoccupied space adjacent to the target, forming walls of ice (AC 12, 20 hp each).
originalText: Glacial Prisonator Rare Wondrous item [requires attunement]

name: Sacrificial Lamb Bombs
description: As an action, all summoned creatures you control immediately explode. Each creature within 5 feet of an exploding creature takes 5d8 force damage (DC 15 Dexterity saving throw for half). You can move each controlled creature up to 25 feet before detonation.

originalText: Magnetic Pulser Rare Wondrous item [requires attunement]

name: Giant Handcannon

name: Rod of the Monkey Fish

originalText: Rod of the Monkey Fish Rare Wondrous item [requires attunement]

name: Crystal Catalyst

name: Breadbeard's Hat

originalText: Breadbeard's Hat Rare Wondrous item (hat) [requires attunement]

name: Jar of Leeches
description: As an action, smash this jar. Five leeches spawn as Tiny creatures (1 hp each). At the start of each of your turns, new leeches spawn from the broken jar up to 5 per round. Each leech attacks the nearest creature, and a successful leech bite permanently reduces the target's hit point maximum by 1.
originalText: Jar of Leeches Uncommon Wondrous item (consumable)

name: Frog Stick Totem

originalText: Golden Gun Very Rare Weapon (pistol) [requires attunement]

name: Kobold Mastery
description: When you roll double results on two dice (two 6s, two 4s, etc.), it counts as a critical success regardless of the number rolled. Only kobolds can attune to this trait.

name: Dwarven Mastery

name: Elven Mastery

originalText: Elven Mastery Very Rare Passive [elves only]

name: Gnome Mastery
description: You gain an additional reaction each round. Only gnomes can attune to this trait.

name: Porc Mastery
description: All class features and abilities that normally expend limited uses no longer do so. Only porcs can attune to this trait.
originalText: Porc Mastery Very Rare Passive [porcs only]

name: Goblin Mastery
description: When you attempt to steal an item from a shop or on a person, you may roll the check twice and take the higher result. Only goblins can attune to this trait.

As a Reaction you knock a hostile creature into Walled Terrain made of Slime, they take an additional 10 damage.
originalText: Deals 9 Damage with Basic Attacks. You and your Companion may now move through Walled Terrain made of Slime.
